subcodes.first_line: Hearken, O Ḥusayn, unto the Call from the Most Glorious Horizon. Verily, there is none other God but Him, the Mighty, the All-Chosen. We have indeed conveyed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ح س ان استمع الندآء من شطر الابهی انه لا اله الا هو العزیز المختار قد بلغنا
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @growth of the Cause
